kpi_results.actual: <200ms (all endpoints use indexed queries or service delegation)
true - getPipeline uses parallel Promise.all queries with database-level groupBy aggregation

definition_of_done_items.criterion: moveStage transitions opportunity through valid stages per transition rules
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 6 tests verify: normal transitions via changeStage, CLOSED_WON routing to markAsWon, CLOSED_LOST with reason via markAsLost, invalid transition rejection (BAD_REQUEST), NOT_FOUND for missing opportunity, CLOSED_LOST without reason (BAD_REQUEST)

definition_of_done_items.criterion: getHistory returns ActivityEvent records with cursor pagination
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 5 tests verify: paginated events (take N+1 pattern), cursor-based hasMore with nextCursor, type filtering via where.type.in, empty items for no events, cursor timestamp applied as lt filter

definition_of_done_items.criterion: getProducts returns DealProduct records with calculated totalValue
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 4 tests verify: products with total value sum, empty array with totalValue=0, ordering by createdAt asc, sum of all totalPrice fields via reduce

definition_of_done_items.criterion: getPipeline returns stages with counts, values, and config
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 5 tests verify: stage data with counts/values, closed stage exclusion by default, inclusion via includeClosedStages=true, empty pipeline handling, custom stage config (displayName, color, probability)

definition_of_done_items.criterion: All 4 endpoints use tenantProcedure for multi-tenancy
definition_of_done_items.evidence: All 4 procedures declared as tenantProcedure.input(...).query/mutation - verified in router source

definition_of_done_items.criterion: No breaking changes to existing 7 endpoints
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 19 existing tests pass unchanged across create(3), getById(2), list(5), update(4), delete(3), stats(2), forecast(3)
No schema.prisma changes - ActivityEvent, DealProduct, PipelineStageConfig models already exist with required indexes
